scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace web/frontend & npm run dev --workspace web/backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace web/frontend && npm run build --workspace web/backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace web/frontend && npm run test --workspace web/backend
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:watch --workspace web/frontend && npm run test:watch --workspace web/backend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace web/frontend && npm run test:coverage --workspace web/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace web/frontend && npm run lint --workspace web/backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace web/frontend && npm run lint:fix --workspace web/backend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace web/frontend && npm run type-check --workspace web/backend
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace web/frontend && npm run clean --workspace web/backend
